arguments.name: retreat_while_eating
arguments.description: Move to the specified x,z coordinates while eating bread from inventory until hunger is full or bread runs out. Keeps relocating while healing to avoid remaining hostiles.

messages.content: Me <NEW ACTION>: Created retreat_while_eating and executed it with {"destination":{"x":50,"z":-30}}. <RETREATED>: Moved toward (50, -30). Ate 1 bread. Final hunger: 20.

Bot2 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 25 is 14.1 blocks away
- zombie id 26 is 15.0 blocks away
- zombie id 27 is 13.1 blocks away

I have recovered to 16.98 health and food is full, meaning passive health regeneration should be active. The three zombies are still 13–15 blocks away. Charging them now would cost regeneration time and risk getting surrounded. I'll stand my ground with sword in hand, let health climb back toward 20, and wait for them to close into melee range.
Me <IDLE>: Chose not to act.

Bot2 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- skeleton id 32

I just took damage.
- Health changed from 19.1 to 14.5 (4.7 lost)
Skeleton down, but I still took damage. I need to top off hunger so health regeneration kicks back in before the approaching zombies close the gap. Going to eat bread while I have a brief window.
Me <EATING>: Eating bread until hunger is full.

Bot2 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 39 is 4.2 blocks away
- zombie id 40 is 4.2 blocks away
- zombie id 41 is 4.2 blocks away
- skeleton id 42 is 4.0 blocks away

Surrounded by four hostiles within 4 blocks — need to break the pin immediately. Pulling stone sword and sidestepping north, perpendicular to the nearest threat (skeleton to the east), to open breathing room.

Me <MOVING>: Moving toward (47, 0, -40) with radius 1.

Me <EQUIPPED>: Now holding Stone Sword.
Me <RETREATED>: Moved toward (47.6, -55). Ate 2 bread. Final hunger: 20.
